/usr/bin/c++   -fstrict-aliasing -Wno-unknown-pragmas -Wno-unused-function -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opengl-craft.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/opengl-craft.dir/Application.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opengl-craft.dir/main.cpp.o" -o opengl-craft  ../third-party/glfw/src/libglfw3.a ../third-party/glad/libglad.a ../third-party/glm/glm/libglm.a /usr/lib64/librt.a -lm -ldl
